name: campayn
description: Reads and writes Campayn subscriber lists, signup forms, contacts, email campaigns, and calendar reports through the Campayn REST API.

risk.read: external Campayn API read of subscriber lists, campaigns, and reports
risk.write: external mutation of Campayn contacts and list-subscription state (add contact, update contact, unsubscribe by id or email); no destructive delete endpoint is documented by the upstream API
risk.approval: none; low-risk marketing-list mutations, no documented destructive writes
